reason_for_decision: The revised article clears the pass threshold with stronger system-level waveform framing, better mission-fit logic, and clearer selection sequence.
strengths: The article now explains how waveform choice affects the rest of the radar platform rather than leaving it as a narrow theory comparison.
It handles FMCW and pulse trade-offs without drifting into a newer-versus-older narrative.
The selection sequence gives readers a usable way to connect waveform family to project constraints.
summary_assessment: This version passes because it makes waveform choice operationally meaningful. It is more coherent and more useful than the earlier draft.
